title: BB Earnings: BlackBerry reports loss for Q1 2025; revenue falls
text: BlackBerry reported Q1 2025 fiscal results with mixed performance across its business segments. The company reported total revenue of $144 million, reflecting challenges in the market. BlackBerry's cybersecurity and IoT divisions collectively contributed 96% of total revenue. IoT revenue increased 18% year-over-year to $53 million, with QNX generating $57.5 million in revenue and 8.1% year-over-year growth. IoT gross margin stood at 81%. The Cybersecurity segment generated $85 million in revenue with ARR of $285 million. The company reported adjusted EBITDA of negative $7 million and free cash usage of $16 million. Total cash and investments reached $283 million. BlackBerry's 2026 revenue forecast was maintained at $508-538 million, reflecting confidence in future growth despite near-term challenges.
